title: Short title
doc_html:
PART III-C. HIGHER EDUCATION FOREIGN

SECURITY ACT OF 2022

§1826.1. Short title

            This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Higher Education Foreign Security Act of 2022".

            Acts 2022, No. 767, §1, eff. July 1, 2023.
doc_text:
PART III-C. HIGHER EDUCATION FOREIGN
SECURITY ACT OF 2022
§1826.1.  Short title
This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Higher Education Foreign Security
Act of 2022".
Acts 2022, No. 767, §1, eff. July 1, 2023.
